narrative:
Brooklyn Heights-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,104 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
